module.name: tool
module.purpose: Standalone marix-host-tool crate that provides both the Executor-side Tool handle and the compiled native tool executables. tool.rs defines Tool, the Executor-side handle to an external tool executable located by filesystem path, whose load/name/description/input_schema/output_schema/preview/execute surface is panic-backed. tool_program.rs defines ToolProgram, the interface each native tool program implements. native/ owns the concrete tool programs, each compiling into its own executable that shares one tool_main.rs entry and is selected at compile time through the cfg-gated SelectedTool alias behind Cargo features. tool_main.rs is the shared binary entry whose main runs the compile-selected tool through a private run<T: ToolProgram> that reads process arguments and speaks the --preview/--run JSON protocol over stdout. Both Tool::preview and ToolProgram::preview return marix_common::ToolPreview. lib.rs and the Cargo manifest are namespace/re-export wiring and package metadata only.

childModules.name: native
childModules.purpose: Concrete native tool programs grouped by category: filesystem tools under file/ and shell command execution under shell/.
